svg.title: Cosmos3 WAN VAE 8-way spatial split with halo overlap
svg.desc: The PhyAI favicon is split into a 2 by 4 core tile grid for eight WAN VAE decode ranks. A selected core tile is shown with an expanded halo region to illustrate overlap decode and later blending.
svg.text: Example: CFG=2, TP=4, world_size=8 -> 2 x 4 core tiles with halo overlap

g.text: core tiles cover the image with no gaps
Each rank decodes its core plus neighboring overlap.
decode_parallel(): tile_grid(8)=2x4; gather over tp then cfg; stitch tiles with halo feather blending.
